amount - Variable in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.ChanceAmountPair
The amount value, representing the quantity associated with the event (e.g., the number of items dropped).
amountedDrops - Variable in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.Entity
Map for drops with variable amounts, where each ItemStack has an associated chance and min/max amount.
amountedSelectiveDrops - Variable in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.Entity
Map for drop groups with variable amounts, where each group has a set chance to drop and each ItemStack has an associated min/max amount, and within the group each ItemStack has its own amount and drop weight within the set.
applicableTypes - Variable in class com.noorlandmc.NoorItems.enchantment.Enchantment
A list of item types that this enchantment can be applied to.

chance - Variable in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.ChanceAmountPair
The chance value, typically a float between 0 and 1, representing the probability of an event occurring (e.g., an item drop).
chance - Variable in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.ChanceMinMaxPair
The chance value, typically a float between 0 and 1, representing the probability of an event occurring (e.g., an item drop).
ChanceAmountPair - Class in com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities
A simple data class that pairs a chance value with an amount, used for defining drops and other chance-based mechanics in the NoorEntities plugin.
